threats.title: Hackers Exploit Windmill Flaw to Read Arbitrary Server Files Without Authentication
threats.summary: A high-severity security flaw impacting open-source developer platform Windmill has come under active exploitation in the wild, per VulnCheck. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-29059 (CVSS score: 7.5), a case of unauthenticated path traversal impacting Windmill's "get_log_file" endpoint ("/api/w/{workspace}/jobs_u/get_log_file/{filename}"). threats.title: Why Modern SOCs Need Multi-Layered Detections
threats.summary: The cycle is over. For years, cybersecurity followed a familiar pattern: defenses improved, attackers adapted, and the back-and-forth continued.
